channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RIKHAV] Rikhav Securities: Detailed Public Statement for Open Offer Submitted
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sobhagya Capital Options Pvt. Ltd., acting as Manager to the Offer for Rikhav Securities Ltd., has submitted a Detailed Public Statement for an Open Offer, adhering to SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The statement details various price calculations relevant to the offer, including a highest acquisition price of ₹40.00 during the 26 weeks preceding the relevant date and a 60-day volume-weighted average market price of ₹47.20. The filing also provides comprehensive shareholding information for the acquirers (B D Lakhani, B N Lakhani, H D Lakhani, N D Lakhani) and Persons Acting in Concert (PACs), outlining their current and post-offer diluted holdings. Additionally, the document includes financial highlights for the past three fiscal years and lists the company's board of directors.

  • Detailed Public Statement for an Open Offer submitted by Sobhagya Capital Options.
  • Offer complies with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, outlining acquisition terms.
  • Highest acquisition price in 26 weeks was ₹40.00; 60-day VWAP was ₹47.20.
  • Lakhani family members are identified as key acquirers and persons acting in concert.
  • Shareholding details, financial highlights, and board composition are provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rikhav Securities Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Technologies Board approves FY26 results; PAT ₹905.73 Lakhs
item.description:
Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 28, 2026, and approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the second half and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The results were accompanied by an unmodified audit opinion from the Statutory Auditors. For the financial year 2026, the company reported a Standalone Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹905.73 Lakhs on a total income of ₹14,338.55 Lakhs. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27.

  • Board approved Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for FY26.
  • FY26 Standalone PAT was ₹905.73 Lakhs, with total income of ₹14,338.55 Lakhs.
  • Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹7.35.
  • M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Cleanrooms FY26 PAT ₹905.73 Lakhs, H2 PAT ₹612.51 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd announced its audited financial results for the half year and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. For the half year ended March 31, 2026, the company reported revenue from operations of ₹9,233.00 Lakhs and a profit after tax (PAT) of ₹612.51 Lakhs, with basic earnings per share (EPS) of ₹4.97. For the full financial year 2026, revenue from operations stood at ₹14,186.13 Lakhs, and PAT was ₹905.73 Lakhs, resulting in a basic EPS of ₹7.35. Additionally, the Board of Directors approved the appointment of M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27.

  • Fabtech Cleanrooms reported ₹905.73 Lakhs PAT for FY26.
  • FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹14,186.13 Lakhs.
  • H2 FY26 PAT stood at ₹612.51 Lakhs.
  • H2 FY26 revenue from operations was ₹9,233.00 Lakhs.
  • Bathiya Advisors LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Technologies FY26 Revenue ₹14,186.13 Lakhs, PAT ₹905.73 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 28, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the second half and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. For FY26, the company reported a revenue from operations of ₹14,186.13 Lakhs and a Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹905.73 Lakhs, with a basic EPS of ₹7.35. The audit report had an unmodified opinion. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27.

  • Board approved audited FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹14,186.13 Lakhs.
  • Profit after tax for FY26 was ₹905.73 Lakhs.
  • Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹7.35.
  • M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [INDUSTOWER] Indus Towers incorporates WOS in GIFT City for ₹2 Cr investment
item.description:
Indus Towers Limited has announced the incorporation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, "Indus Towers Global Ventures IFSC Limited," in Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City) on April 28, 2026. The new subsidiary, established with a share capital of ₹2 crore (20,00,000 equity shares of ₹10 each), will serve as an investment holding company for the company's overseas subsidiaries. It will also undertake treasury functions and other permitted activities under the IFSC framework. This strategic move aims to streamline international investments and financial operations. The WOS is a related party and is yet to commence business operations.

  • Indus Towers incorporated "Indus Towers Global Ventures IFSC Limited" as a WOS.
  • The subsidiary is established in GIFT City, Gujarat, India.
  • Initial investment for 100% shareholding is ₹2 crore.
  • The WOS will function as an investment holding and treasury company.
  • It is a related party and is yet to commence business operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indus Towers Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Technologies FY26 PAT ₹905.73 Lakhs; Appoints Auditor
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd announced its audited financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported a standalone Profit After Tax (PAT) of ₹905.73 Lakhs for FY26, with a basic Earnings Per Share (EPS) of ₹7.35. For the second half of FY26, the standalone PAT was ₹612.51 Lakhs. Additionally, the Board of Directors, at their meeting on April 28, 2026, approved the appointment of M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Fabtech Technologies reported FY26 standalone PAT of ₹905.73 Lakhs.
  • Basic EPS for FY26 stood at ₹7.35.
  • H2 FY26 standalone PAT was ₹612.51 Lakhs.
  • M/s. Bathiya Advisors LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for FY26-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results on April 28, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Technologies Launches Tyrone ParallelStor Velox Unified Data Platform
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Netweb Technologies India Ltd has introduced Tyrone ParallelStor Velox, a Unified Data Platform designed to tackle the critical data bottleneck in AI infrastructure. This platform acts as a high-performance data backbone for AI, HPC, and enterprise workloads, ensuring data access, movement, and processing at the speed modern compute demands. Velox unifies data across flash, disk, tape, and cloud into a single global namespace, eliminating silos and enabling seamless, high-speed access. It is engineered for data velocity and scale, supporting advanced data path optimization technologies like NVIDIA GPUDirect Storage for direct data transfer between storage and GPU memory, significantly reducing latency for AI/ML workloads. The platform also provides unified data across hybrid and distributed environments with multi-protocol access and policy-driven data lifecycle management. Built in India, Velox is designed for data-intensive sectors including AI & HPC, Government, and BFSI, aligning with the need for sovereign AI infrastructure.

  • Netweb Technologies launched Tyrone ParallelStor Velox, a unified data platform.
  • The platform addresses data bottlenecks in AI, HPC, and enterprise infrastructure.
  • It offers a high-performance data backbone with multi-protocol access and unified namespace.
  • Velox supports NVIDIA GPUDirect Storage for faster AI/ML workload processing.
  • Designed for sovereign and mission-critical infrastructure in key sectors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KSB] KSB Files Annual Report for FY2025, Includes AGM Notice
item.description:
KSB Ltd has submitted its Annual Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, in compliance with Regulation 34 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The report comprises the Board’s Report, Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Statements, and the Auditor's Report. Additionally, the filing includes the Notice for the 66th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for May 20, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. (IST) via Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means. The Annual Report and AGM Notice have been disseminated to shareholders via email and a web-link, and are also available on the company's website.

  • KSB submitted its Annual Report for the financial year 2025.
  • Report includes audited standalone and consolidated financials.
  • Notice for 66th Annual General Meeting on May 20, 2026.
  • Documents are available on the company website for shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KSB Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [INFOBEAN] InfoBeans FY26 PAT Doubles to ₹87 Cr; Revenue up 32% to ₹539 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

InfoBeans Technologies announced exceptional financial performance for Q4 FY26 and the full year ended March 31, 2026. Full-year FY26 revenue grew 32% YoY to ₹539 Cr (24% in USD), with EBITDA rising 64% to ₹138 Cr. Profit After Tax (PAT) more than doubled to ₹87 Cr, a 128% YoY increase. Q4 FY26 was the company's best quarter, with revenue at ₹147 Cr (up 37% YoY) and PAT at ₹21 Cr (up 104% YoY), achieving a 15% PAT margin. The company also announced a total dividend of ₹1.00 per share for FY26, comprising a ₹0.50 normal dividend and a ₹0.50 special dividend. InfoBeans onboarded 24 new clients for the year, with 43% of revenue now from AI-augmented software development.

  • FY26 PAT more than doubled to ₹87 Cr, a 128% year-on-year increase.
  • Full-year FY26 revenue grew 32% YoY to ₹539 Cr.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue increased 37% YoY to ₹147 Cr, marking the best quarter.
  • Company declared a total dividend of ₹1.00 per share for FY26.
  • FY26 EBITDA rose 64% YoY to ₹138 Cr, reflecting strong operational efficiency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Infobeans Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KPITTECH] KPIT Technologies Grants 21,000 Options Under RSU Plan 2022
item.description:
KPIT Technologies' Nomination and Remuneration (HR) Committee approved the grant of 21,000 options to eligible employees under the KPIT Technologies Limited - Restricted Stock Unit Plan 2022 (RSU Plan 2022) on April 28, 2026. The RSU Plan 2022 was previously approved by shareholders on August 24, 2022. Each option allows the employee to be issued one share at an exercise price of ₹10, which is the face value of the share. Options will vest after a minimum of 1 year and a maximum of 4 years from the grant date, and can be exercised within 5 years from the vesting date.

  • KPIT Technologies granted 21,000 options to eligible employees.
  • Options were granted under the RSU Plan 2022.
  • The exercise price is ₹10 per option, which is the face value.
  • Options will vest between 1 to 4 years from the grant date.
  • Vested options are exercisable within 5 years from vesting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPIT Technologies Ltd | Category: ESOP
